aru: malo ra maru. malo ra nela.
en: The house is big. The house is good.

aru: mene ra nema ke ya Aru. mene ra lowa ke sipu.
en: The person studies Aru. The person reads a text.

aru: roka ra tanu. na ra no naka so etu roka.
en: Rain comes. I do not go because of rain.

aru: mene re ri ra raku ke sipu, ra nela.
en: The person who writes a text is good.

aru: malo i ra maru pasu malo ena.
en: This house is bigger than that house.

aru: lani ne ta ra se? lani ne na ra ya Mira.
en: What is your name? My name is Mira.

aru: tulu i ra rupi. na ra pawa mela ke i.
en: This tool is broken. I can repair it.

aru: ta ra pa no tanu so etu se? na ra pa no tanu so etu roka.
en: Why did you not come? I did not come because of rain.

aru: na ra raku ke sipu lisu.
sipu i ra puka, sia mene mun ra lowa ke i.
en: This text is open, therefore many people read it.
